originalArgs.about: BotFather is the one bot to rule them all. Use it to create new bot accounts and manage your existing bots.

originalArgs.description:
BotFather is the one bot to rule them all. Use it to create new bot accounts and manage your existing bots.

About Telegram bots:
https://core.telegram.org/bots

https://core.telegram.org/bots/api

Contact @BotSupport if you have questions about the Bot API.
